name: jessegall/code-commandments
description: A Laravel package for enforcing code commandments through prophets who judge and absolve transgressions

scripts-descriptions.judge:self: Run the prophets against this package's own src/ (dogfooding).
scripts-descriptions.judge:self:next: Walk the package's own findings one at a time.
scripts-descriptions.issues: List every open issue (prophet-reports AND feature requests/bugs) WITH its body and all comments — the one command for triaging inbound issues; always read comments.
scripts-descriptions.issues:new: Show only NEW open issues since the last check (tracked in .commandments/seen-issues) with body+comments + the response protocol. Use `--seed` to baseline. Drive on a loop: /loop 5m composer issues:new.
scripts-descriptions.update-consumers: Run `composer require --dev jessegall/code-commandments` in each .env-registered consumer — that pins ^latest and fires the consumer's post-update sync (prophets/scaffold/skills/hooks/CLAUDE.md). Leaves changes uncommitted for you to review and push.
scripts-descriptions.readme: Regenerate the auto-generated README sections (prophet + command tables) from the source classes.
scripts-descriptions.readme:check: Fail if the auto-generated README sections are stale (run in the pre-commit hook / CI).
